title: cirrus: Add bash-completion support
body:
Fixes #3447 

This is fairly standard thing to have on a user's workstation, supported
by podman.  When installed in a VM image, then it's useful for debugging
with `hack/get_ci_vm.sh` at the cost of a minor increase in disk-space.

***Depends on #4054***

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: ***Note:*** Having new VM cache-images is probably a good idea anyway, it's been a while since they were updated.  Perhaps we'll pick up a new CNI package w/ fix to the 'iptables: chain already exists' problem.
LGTM
@cevich Is this still something you are working on ?
Yeah, sorry, it got lost in the flurry of exit-code troubleshooting.  I'll rebase and give it a whirl again...
@cevich is this still a WIP or is it ready to merge?  Seems to be passing tests.
Oh goodie, that's what I was hoping for...no it's still WIP until I reference the freshly build images...
...okay, now these are the important tests, but I'm optimistic.
:smile_cat: okay, NOW it's ready to go :smile_cat:

/approve
@baude @mheon @giuseppe @vrothberg @jwhonce @QiWang19 PTAL

:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3754) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@cevich rebase and i will merge
need to roll new images for this
/hold

> @cevich rebase and i will merge

Thanks, but I've piled another commit in here [to help with a problem in buildah-land](https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/432#issuecomment-533821529) - since a separate fix would mean re-rolling images yet again...my favorite activity :face_with_head_bandage:   I think I've almost got it though...
Image build ref: https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5195212252512256
/hold cancel
/hold
I Want to get the fix for #3447 (new cni packages) into these images...
LGTM
/hold cancel
new containernetworking-plugins package versions confirmed
okay I think this one is ready.
/lgtm
